title: My Body Is a Safe Place to Live
subtitle: An affirmation for returning to the body as home
excerpt: An affirmation from Day 6 of Rebecca's WEIGHT LOSS program for reclaiming the body as a safe place. For use when the body has felt like a problem to solve rather than a home to live in.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 6 of WEIGHT LOSS: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the body has been treated as the enemy this week: criticised, ignored, or endured. Good as a morning reset after a night of poor sleep or a day of body-focused worry.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 6 of Rebecca's WEIGHT LOSS program. It targets the relationship with the body directly: not what the body looks like, but whether the body feels like a place you are safe to be in.
This affirmation works on the gap between the body you have and the body you think you need before you can relax into it. The statement reclaims the body as home now, not later.
My body is a safe place to live.

Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on your sternum. If it feels untrue, say a smaller version that is true: "My body is doing what it can today." Return to the full affirmation when you can.
Adapted from Day 6 of WEIGHT LOSS: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
